## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss challenges and improvements in content production workflow between Aembit and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current content quality issues persist despite revised processes, with concerns about technical accuracy, narrative flow, and contextual framing](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [GrowthX is implementing new "agentic workflows" to address consistency issues and better leverage their knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Team will try outline reviews before full articles to reduce editing cycles](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Publishing is temporarily paused while addressing quality concerns; focus is on refining current batch of articles](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Workflow Issues

  - [Melissa (Aembit brand person) connected with Faye (Nigeria-based CM) who expressed concerns about WordPress familiarity](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [GrowthX clarified their publishing structure: Content Managers gather information, Suleiman (new dedicated publisher) handles actual publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Ehtisham taking an action item to facilitate a working session between team members to address any blockers](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [GrowthX is centralizing their publication process with dedicated resources to streamline workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

### Content Quality Concerns

  - [Dan reviewed articles and found mixed quality - some appeared more robust than others](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Key issues identified:](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [Lack of proper framing/context for comparison articles ("versus" pieces)](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Missing storytelling elements and empathetic hooks at the beginning of articles](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Inconsistent terminology (e.g., "machine identities" vs "non-human identities" vs "workload identities")](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
      - [Some pieces feel like "divergent thoughts strung together" rather than cohesive narratives](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [Apoorva (not present) provided extensive critical feedback, expressing concern that content quality hasn't improved significantly](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Team needs to ensure consistent incorporation of key concepts (e.g., MCP protocol)](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [GrowthX implementing new "agentic workflows" designed to be more iterative and better leverage their knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [New workflows should help ensure Aembit's terminology preferences are used consistently](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Team will test outline reviews before producing full articles to catch issues earlier](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Content needs to balance technical accuracy with accessibility for different audience profiles](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Security/IT audience has lower tolerance for AI-generated or marketing-heavy content](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)

### Performance Measurement

  - [Team hasn't yet reviewed analytics for published content](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [GrowthX has a customized dashboard available but didn't review it during this meeting](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Dan expressed interest in getting insights from existing content performance](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX will respond directly to Apoorva's detailed comments on articles](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Team will proceed with outline review approach for next batch of content](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Implement new agentic workflows to improve content quality and consistency](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Dan and Darrell will schedule a separate 15-minute check-in to monitor progress](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Review analytics dashboard in next meeting to analyze performance of published content](https://fathom.video/share/Rd4qy5ofdRhzB-PFwxvfs1AijaM3EZDH?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
